ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publication_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "article_version" TEXT /* Version of the article (e.g., Accepted Manuscript, Published PDF) */,
  "allowed" TEXT /* Whether the version is allowed to be shared (Yes, No, Hybrid) */,
  "embargo" TEXT /* Embargo period for the version (if applicable) */,
  "sr_policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific S/R (Sherpa/Romeo) policy ID */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions that must be met for sharing the version */,
  "license" TEXT /* License associated with the version (if applicable) */,
  "copyright_owner" TEXT /* Owner of the copyright for the version */,
  "policy_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy becomes effective */,
  "policy_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy expires */,
  "policy_version" TEXT /* Version number of the policy to track changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the policy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the policy was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the policy */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the policy */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the policy is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_policies_sr_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("sr_policy_id") REFERENCES sr_policies ("sr_policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sr_policies" (
  "sr_policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each S/R policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the S/R policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the S/R policy */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher associated with the policy */,
  "policy_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the S/R policy becomes effective */,
  "policy_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the S/R policy expires */,
  "policy_version" TEXT /* Version number of the S/R policy to track changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the S/R policy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the S/R policy was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the S/R policy */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the S/R policy */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the S/R policy is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sr_policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the article is published */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the article record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the article record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article version */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the `article_id` in the `articles` table */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of the article version (e.g., Accepted Manuscript, Published PDF) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file of the article version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the version record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the version record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Researcher, Administrator, Legal Advisor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the user account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Researcher, Administrator, Legal Advisor) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the role */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy change */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the `policy_id` in the `publication_policies` table */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., Update, Deactivate) */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the change (e.g., new conditions, new embargo period) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the change record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the change record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_changes_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES publication_policies ("policy_id")
)
